nav.needsAuditsHint: Available once your first campaign exists.

campaignChat.emptyBody: Ask a question about this campaign's interviews. Answers cite the anonymized participant and utterance they came from, or decline when there's no evidence.
campaignChat.placeholder: e.g. Did anyone in Legal mention onboarding pain?
campaignChat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
campaignChat.refineBody: Re-open the setup assistant to reword context, adjust objectives, or add participants. Changes apply only to interviews that start after the change — completed interviews and their insights stay immutable.

settingsDialog.title: Settings
settingsDialog.themeHint: System follows your OS preference. Saved on this device only.

placeholder.interviewsBody: A cross-campaign view of every interview your organization has run. Lands with the Org Dashboard.
placeholder.chatBody: Ask free-form questions across all of your campaigns. Answers cite their sources or decline.
placeholder.vaultsBody: Store and curate the company context that grounds every interview and synthesis.
placeholder.integrationsBody: Connect Inplicit to the tools your team already uses.
placeholder.twinBody: Pre-simulate each participant's likely thinking from their role before the interview, then refine the role model from real answers.
placeholder.twinRolesBody: The role graph that powers persona simulation. Reports-to and manages edges define the hierarchy.
placeholder.adminBody: Manage your organization, members, and workspace settings.

ai.disclaimer: I'm an AI assistant drafting configuration — every field stays editable by you.

launchpad.title: What do you want to learn?
launchpad.subtitle: Describe your research goal in your own words. The setup assistant will draft a configurable campaign catalog you can refine.
launchpad.placeholder: e.g. Why are mid-market customers churning after onboarding?
launchpad.firstHint: This is your first campaign — type a learning goal to begin.
launchpad.prefilledRolesHint: These roles will seed the new campaign's audience.

prozesswissen.label: Process knowledge
prozesswissen.description: How work really gets done — including workarounds and friction.
prozesswissen.prompt: How do our core processes really run day to day — where do friction, workarounds and untapped knowledge appear?

operatives.label: Operational know-how
operatives.description: Hands-on experience from daily work that's rarely written down.
operatives.prompt: What operational, hands-on knowledge do our teams carry day to day that is documented nowhere?

innovationspotenziale.label: Innovation potential
innovationspotenziale.description: Untapped opportunities and ideas from the people involved.
innovationspotenziale.prompt: Where do our people see untapped opportunities, ideas and innovation potential?

chat.title: Setup assistant
chat.placeholder: Reply or ask the assistant to adjust the catalog…
chat.voiceComingSoonHint: The spoken interview is coming soon. For now, just type here.

catalog.title: Campaign catalog
catalog.subtitle: Everything the assistant drafts lands here — edit any field directly.
catalog.goalsEmpty: No goals yet — describe your question in the chat.
catalog.backgroundPlaceholder: Context the assistant and interviewer should know…
catalog.contextHint: The selected context vault supplies the assistant and interviewer with company knowledge.
catalog.contextEmpty: No context vaults yet — create one under “Vaults” first.
catalog.researchMethodHint: Inductive explores openly; deductive tests existing hypotheses.
catalog.successEmpty: No success criteria yet — define what success means in the chat.
catalog.peopleEmpty: No participants yet — add a person or upload a CSV.
catalog.csvHint: CSV columns: email (required), name, department, role.
catalog.scheduleHint: Participants book a slot and receive a calendar invite — not an open-anytime link.
catalog.instantHint: Each participant gets a direct, single-use link — no booking step. The invite uses {{link}} directly.
catalog.objectivePlaceholder: What exactly do we want to find out?
catalog.roleContextHint: Pick a role and upload files — they land in that role's vault and feed the interviews.
catalog.roleContextNoRoles: No roles yet — create one under “Roles” first.

review.title: Review your campaign
review.subtitle: Confirm the catalog below, then launch. Everything stays editable from the campaign once it's live.
review.launchFailed: Couldn't launch the campaign. Please try again.
review.flashInviteFailed: Campaign created, but invites couldn't be sent. Retry from here.
review.advisoryNoPeople: No participants yet — add people before inviting.

gates.no_success_criteria: Add at least one success question or hypothesis.
gates.bad_duration: Set a duration between 5 and 90 minutes.

errors.agent_unavailable: The assistant is temporarily unavailable. Showing a draft instead.

orgInterviews.title: Interviews
orgInterviews.emptyBody: Once your campaigns run interviews, they all show up here.

knowledgeChat.title: Knowledge Chat
knowledgeChat.emptyBody: Ask a free-form question spanning all of your campaigns. Answers cite the campaign, anonymized participant and utterance, or decline when there's no evidence.
knowledgeChat.placeholder: e.g. Did anyone, in any study, mention onboarding pain?
knowledgeChat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

vaults.title: Context Vaults
vaults.empty: No vaults yet. Create one to reuse company context across campaigns.
vaults.contentPlaceholder: Paste context, notes, or a URL…
vaults.selectPrompt: Select a vault to view its entries.

vaultHub.title: Context Vault
vaultHub.subtitle: One home for all the context that grounds your interviews and synthesis.
vaultHub.orgDesc: Reusable company context that grounds every campaign.
vaultHub.rolesDesc: The role hierarchy as a digital twin — open a role for its context.
vaultHub.rolesEmpty: No roles yet. Roles are mapped to participants on upload.
vaultHub.integrationsDesc: Outbound connectors for notifications and exports.
vaultHub.integrationsHubNote: Integrations are moving into the Context Vault. Until then, the existing page stays available.
vaultHub.uploadsDesc: Uploaded documents and files from your vaults.
vaultHub.searchHint: Ask a question or type a keyword — we search across all vault content.
vaultHub.dropHint: PDF, Word, text or Markdown. Extracted and indexed automatically.
vaultHub.itemsEmpty: No items in this collection yet.

twin.title: Digital Twin
twin.meta: Pre-simulate each role's likely thinking before interviews, then refine the role model from real answers. Simulated, role-keyed, never per-person.
twin.empty: No roles yet. Roles are seeded from the occupation taxonomy and mapped to participants on upload.
twin.noPredicted: No predicted pains yet — run a simulation for this campaign.
twin.noValidated: No validated pains yet — predicted only until real interviews land.
twin.coldMeta: Predicted only. This role's twin has no validated data from real interviews yet.
twin.refinedMeta: Twin v{version} · {confidence}% confidence from real interviews.
twin.rolesMeta: Select roles to start a campaign with them as the audience. Roles only — never per-person.
twin.rolesSelectHint: Select roles for a new campaign

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Outbound connectors for notifications and exports.
integrations.ssoNote: Single sign-on (SAML/OIDC) is on the roadmap and not yet available.

orgAdmin.title: Admin
orgAdmin.membersBody: Invite teammates and manage their access.
orgAdmin.vaultsBody: Curate reusable company context for new campaigns.

welcome.title: Welcome to Inplicit
welcome.body: Inplicit runs AI voice interviews and turns them into validated insights. Here is a quick tour of where everything lives.

sidebar.title: Your navigation
sidebar.body: The sidebar is your home base. It adapts to where you are and collapses on focused screens.

create.title: Create a campaign
create.body: Start here: describe what you want to learn and the setup agent builds the campaign with you.

campaigns.title: Your campaigns
campaigns.body: Every study lives here. Open one to see its insights, participants, hypotheses, and knowledge map.

breadcrumb.title: Always know where you are
breadcrumb.body: The breadcrumb shows your exact location and lets you jump back up at any time.

stepper.title: Multi-step flows
stepper.body: When a task has stages — like building and launching a campaign — the stepper shows your progress.

interviews.title: Interviews
interviews.body: Browse completed and in-progress interviews across all of your campaigns in one place.

chat.title: Knowledge Chat
chat.body: Ask questions across all your interviews. Answers always cite their sources or decline.

vaults.title: Context Vaults
vaults.body: Curate reusable company context so every new campaign starts with what the agent should know.

twin.title: Digital Twin
twin.body: Pre-simulate how participants might think from their role to sharpen your questions before you launch.

finish.title: You are all set
finish.body: That's the tour. You can replay it anytime from the sidebar. Ready to create your first campaign?

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitleMagic: We'll send you a secure one-time link.

feedback.title: Give feedback
feedback.description: Tell us what works well on this page or what could be better.
